cases.summary: Excellent storyboard that decisively meets all 6 rubric criteria with production-ready specificity. Ready for video producer handoff.

cases.summary: The storyboard is structurally sound and addresses 5 of 6 rubric criteria with competent execution: scenes, hook timing, CTA, animations, and captions are all present and well-described.
